queries.users_total: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM users
queries.dau: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)::int AS value FROM refresh_tokens WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
queries.signups_timeseries: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', NOW()) - ($1::int - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day', date_trunc('day', NOW()), INTERVAL '1 day') AS d) SELECT to_char(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS t, COALESCE(COUNT(u.id), 0)::int AS value FROM days LEFT JOIN users u ON date_trunc('day', u.created_at) = days.d GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d
queries.active_timeseries: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', NOW()) - ($1::int - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day', date_trunc('day', NOW()), INTERVAL '1 day') AS d) SELECT to_char(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS t, COUNT(DISTINCT rt.user_id)::int AS value FROM days LEFT JOIN refresh_tokens rt ON rt.created_at >= days.d AND rt.created_at < days.d + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d

kpis.label: Events (7d)
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM events WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

kpis.label: Participants (7d)
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM event_participants WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

queries.users_total: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM users
queries.dau: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)::int AS value FROM refresh_tokens WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
queries.signups_timeseries: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', NOW()) - ($1::int - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day', date_trunc('day', NOW()), INTERVAL '1 day') AS d) SELECT to_char(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS t, COALESCE(COUNT(u.id), 0)::int AS value FROM days LEFT JOIN users u ON date_trunc('day', u.created_at) = days.d GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d
queries.active_timeseries: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', NOW()) - ($1::int - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day', date_trunc('day', NOW()), INTERVAL '1 day') AS d) SELECT to_char(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS t, COUNT(DISTINCT rt.user_id)::int AS value FROM days LEFT JOIN refresh_tokens rt ON rt.created_at >= days.d AND rt.created_at < days.d + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d

kpis.label: Todos done (7d)
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM todos WHERE completed=true AND COALESCE(updated_at,created_at) > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

kpis.label: Active projects
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM projects

queries.users_total: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM users
queries.dau: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)::int AS value FROM payments WHERE COALESCE(paid_at, created_at) > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
queries.signups_timeseries: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', NOW()) - ($1::int - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day', date_trunc('day', NOW()), INTERVAL '1 day') AS d) SELECT to_char(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS t, COALESCE(COUNT(u.id), 0)::int AS value FROM days LEFT JOIN users u ON date_trunc('day', u.created_at) = days.d GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d
queries.active_timeseries: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', NOW()) - ($1::int - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day', date_trunc('day', NOW()), INTERVAL '1 day') AS d) SELECT to_char(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS t, COUNT(DISTINCT p.user_id)::int AS value FROM days LEFT JOIN payments p ON COALESCE(p.paid_at, p.created_at) >= days.d AND COALESCE(p.paid_at, p.created_at) < days.d + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d

kpis.label: Total debt tracked
kpis.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::float8 AS value FROM debts

kpis.label: Payments (7d)
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM payments WHERE COALESCE(paid_at,created_at) > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
